mapper.select: SELECT * FROM water_varnish_matte_product ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM water_varnish_matte_product WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT * FROM water_varnish_matte_product WHERE material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR usage LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO water_varnish_matte_product ( material_code, supplier_code, stock_code, material_name, usage, material_type, color, responsible_person, min_sheet_size, max_sheet_size, min_point, max_point, min_line, max_line, min_spacing, max_spacing, min_area, max_area, structure_application, applicable_interface, notes, gloss, writing_function, is_active ) VALUES ( #{materialCode}, #{supplierCode}, #{stockCode}, #{materialName}, #{usage}, #{materialType}, #{color}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{minSheetSize}, #{maxSheetSize}, #{minPoint}, #{maxPoint}, #{minLine}, #{maxLine}, #{minSpacing}, #{maxSpacing}, #{minArea}, #{maxArea}, #{structureApplication}, #{applicableInterface}, #{notes}, #{gloss}, #{writingFunction}, #{isActive} )
mapper.update: UPDATE water_varnish_matte_product SET material_code = #{materialCode}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, stock_code = #{stockCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, usage = #{usage}, material_type = #{materialType}, color = #{color}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, min_sheet_size = #{minSheetSize}, max_sheet_size = #{maxSheetSize}, min_point = #{minPoint}, max_point = #{maxPoint}, min_line = #{minLine}, max_line = #{maxLine}, min_spacing = #{minSpacing}, max_spacing = #{maxSpacing}, min_area = #{minArea}, max_area = #{maxArea}, structure_application = #{structureApplication}, applicable_interface = #{applicableInterface}, notes = #{notes}, gloss = #{gloss}, writing_function = #{writingFunction}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM water_varnish_matte_compatibility ORDER BY product_id ASC, display_order ASC
SELECT * FROM water_varnish_matte_compatibility WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND post_processing_step = #{postProcessingStep}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO water_varnish_matte_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES (#{productId}, #{postProcessingStep}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{displayOrder})

INSERT INTO water_varnish_matte_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES
(#{item.productId}, #{item.postProcessingStep}, #{item.compatibilityStatus}, #{item.displayOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT post_processing_step FROM water_varnish_matte_compatibility ORDER BY post_processing_step ASC
